buildCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 -b 3.29.3 /tmp/flutter && /tmp/flutter/bin/flutter pub get && /tmp/flutter/bin/flutter build web --release --dart-define=RESEARCHER_PIN=2026 && sed -i "s|</head>|<script>window.__NOVICE_CONFIG__={supabaseUrl:\"$SUPABASE_URL\",supabaseAnonKey:\"$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY\",researcherPin:\"2026\"};</script></head>|" build/web/index.html
